name: ruby_explicit

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.1 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] The explicit base marker ｜ delimits the ruby base 青梅 before 《おうめ》; html is <ruby> with <rp> fallbacks (§8). Offsets from the §3 byte model.

source: 明治の頃｜青梅《おうめ》街道沿いに。

expected.html: 明治の頃青梅(おうめ)街道沿いに。
expected.serialize: 明治の頃｜青梅《おうめ》街道沿いに。
